mapper.select: SELECT id, username, email, password_hash, avatar_url, role, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, email, password_hash, avatar_url, role, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, email, password_hash, avatar_url, role) VALUES (#{username}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{avatarUrl}, #{role})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
